response.original_title: Conadepianos. La historia del NUNCA MÁS contada por sus trabajadores
response.overview: Documentary that reconstructs the history of CONADEP (1984) and the preparation of the Nunca más report through the testimonies of its former workers. They recount the creation of the Commission, its internal organization, and the procedures for recording statements about kidnappings, torture, and disappearances, facing the inherent conflicts of seeking truth and justice while the dictatorship's repressive apparatus remained intact. Through archival footage, it also addresses the political context of the early days of democracy.
response.title: Conadepianos. La historia del NUNCA MÁS contada por sus trabajadores
